Name: MAP_OBJECT_TORCH_PARAM
Description: Defines behavior and timing for torch-based map objects, including fire duration and initial activation state.

Fields.Name: Fire Duration
Fields.Description: Duration (in seconds) that the torch remains lit.

Fields.Name: Motion Reference Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon used as a reference point for torch motion or animation alignment.

Fields.Name: Enabled Initially
Fields.Description: Determines whether the torch starts in an active (lit) state when the map loads.
